# ProcurementAI (Prototype)

Prototype of a structured directory of AI-enabled procurement companies.

## Key pages
- Home: index.html
- Explore companies: tools.html
- Use cases: /use-case/*/index.html
- Company pages: /company/*/index.html
- Weekly updates: weekly-updates.html

## Utility pages
- About: about.html
- FAQ: faq.html
- Submit a company: submit-company.html
- Claim a company profile: claim.html

## Data freshness
- Data last verified: 2026-02-14
